TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Mknahuy == u sulit nu Hulam: śčŅšļíšľäťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hsinchu a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Mknahuy. u kasalumaluma' nu Mknahuy sa, 115 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 321 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 248 ku tademaw, pakalatu 77%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 73 ku tademaw, pakalatu 23%. u kasabinacadan, Tayan(Tayal) 74%, Pangcha(Amis) 2%, zumazuma 1%. u Tayan a niyazu' u Tayan a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Tayan a tademaw itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Pangcah, u Yuwatan, u Taluku, inayi' tu ku zuma a cidakay itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. izaw ku malecaday a ngangan nu Sakizaya atu Tayan. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah, saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052
S.PHON: == mknańßuj == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßsin ¶ńßu a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu mknańßuj. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu mknańßuj sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) **%, paŇč ¶ńßa(amis) *%, zumazuma *%. u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku tajan a tad…ômaw itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u paŇč ¶ańß, u juwatan, u tar~…ĺuku, inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma a ¶idakaj itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. izaw ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja atu tajan. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß, saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***
S.FORM: == Mknahuy == u sulit nu Hulam: śčŅšļíšľäťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hsinchu a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Mknahuy. u kasalumaluma' nu Mknahuy sa, 115 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 321 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 248 ku tademaw, pakalatu 77%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 73 ku tademaw, pakalatu 23%. u kasabinacadan, Tayan(Tayal) 74%, Pangcha(Amis) 2%, zumazuma 1%. u Tayan a niyazu' u Tayan a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Tayan a tademaw itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Pangcah, u Yuwatan, u Taluku, inayi' tu ku zuma a cidakay itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. izaw ku malecaday a ngangan nu Sakizaya atu Tayan. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah, saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052
S.PHON: == mknańßuj == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßsin ¶ńßu a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu mknańßuj. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu mknańßuj sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) **%, paŇč ¶ńßa(amis) *%, zumazuma *%. u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku tajan a tad…ômaw itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u paŇč ¶ańß, u juwatan, u tar~…ĺuku, inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma a ¶idakaj itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. izaw ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja atu tajan. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß, saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***),
